meta.description: Rosco Guitars string tension engine — D'Addario XL unit weights + Rosco tension targets

plain_steel.comment: PL series — D'Addario plain steel, Lock Twist. Values in lbs/inch.

nickel_wound.comment: NW series — D'Addario XL Nickelplated Steel Round Wound. Values in lbs/inch.

interpolated.comment: Half-size gauges not in the PDF — unit weights calculated by linear interpolation between adjacent PL values. Used for gauges like 9.5, 10.5, 11.5, 12.5, 16.5.

gauge_to_part_number.comment: Maps gauge label (as it appears in Airtable) to D'Addario part number prefix and unit weight key. 'w' suffix = wound.

rosco_tension_targets.description: Rosco Guitars target tensions per string position. Philosophy: tension-balanced sets. Buttery smooth highs, tight focused lows.

3.note: G — wound if gauge >19p, then target 16 lbs

string_packs.comment: Generated packs will be added here by Cowork in future steps. Format per pack shown below.
